questions.question_bn: একটি সংখ্যাকে 119 দ্বারা ভাগ করলে 19 ভাগশেষ থাকে। সংখ্যাটিকে 17 দ্বারা ভাগ করলে ভাগশেষ থাকে

questions.question: A person travels from A to B at a speed of 40 kmph and returns by decreasing his speed by 50%. What is his average speed for both the trips?
questions.question_bn: এক ব্যক্তি 40 কিলোমিটার/ঘণ্টা গতিতে A থেকে B পর্যন্ত গিয়ে তার গতিবেগ 50% হ্রাস করে ফিরে আসে। সমগ্র যাত্রাপথে ব্যক্তির গড় গতিবেগ কত?

questions.question: In a 100m race, A runs at 8 km per hour. If A gives B a start of 4m and still beats him by 15 seconds, find the speed of B in m/sec.
questions.question_bn: 100 মিটারের একটি প্রতিযোগিতায় A ঘণ্টায় 8 কিমি বেগে দৌড়ায়। B যখন 4 মিটার যায় তখন A দৌড় শুরু করে তবুও B কে 15 সেকেন্ডে পরাজিত করে। B-এর গতিবেগ মি./সে.-এ নির্ণয় করো।

questions.question: Fill in the blank with an appropriate preposition from the list below: The cat sneaked in and sat ________ the little girl.
Complete the idiom by choosing the right word from the options given below: He moved heaven and ________ to get bail for his friend.
Find out the correct sentence from the list below:

options.a: The behaviour of the children were not up to the mark.
options.b: The behaviour of the children was not up to the mark.
options.c: The behaviours of the children was not up to the mark.
options.d: The behaviours of the children were not up to the mark.

questions.question: Change from Active to Passive voice, choosing from the options below: The tutor taught Ronny Mathematics for two years.

options.a: Ronny was taught by the tutor Mathematics for two years.
options.b: Mathematics was taught for Ronny by the tutor for two years.
options.c: Ronny was taught Mathematics by the tutor for two years.
options.d: Ronny was taught by the tutor for two years, Mathematics.

questions.question: Change from Active to Passive voice, choosing from the options below: The society will help the poor children with money.

options.a: The poor children will be helped by the society with money.
options.b: The society will be helped by the poor children with money.
options.c: The poor children will receive help from the society with money.
options.d: The poor children will help the society with money.

questions.question: Choose the correct form of the verb from the options given below: Have you heard that Mr. Basu ________ the Chairman of the Executive Committee?
Complete the idiom by choosing the right word from the options given below: The women in the country fought tooth and ________ for liberation.
Fill in the blank with an appropriate word from the list below: Neither of the two brothers Ramesh and Suresh ________ found suitable for the job at the interview held yesterday.
Find out from the given words the opposite of 'Dangerous'.
Choose the correct form of the verb from the options given below: By the time we reached home the rain ________.
Complete the idiom by choosing the right word from the options given below: She could not make up her ________ about what to buy.
Choose the correct spelling from the options below:
Replace the missing word with the right word from the options below: A list of ________ candidates for the admission test has been put up on the notice-board.
Find from below, the word that means 'a boy who frightens weaker boys'.
Choose the correct spelling from the options below:
Find out the right word to complete the following sentence: The government punished him because of his ________ activities.
Change from Passive to Active voice, choosing from the options below: Many things may be accomplished by a little effort.

options.a: They may accomplish many things by little effort.
options.b: They can accomplish many things by little effort.
options.c: One may accomplish by little effort many things.
options.d: One may accomplish many things by a little effort.

questions.question: Fill in the blank with an appropriate preposition from the list below: The deer is afraid ________ the tiger.
Change the following statement into an interrogative sentence: She had time to finish all the questions.

options.a: Do you think that she did have time to finish all the questions?
options.b: Had she no time to finish all the questions?
options.c: Did she manage to finish all the questions?
options.d: Had she time to finish all the questions?

questions.question: Find the word which has the same meaning as 'Cautious'.
Find from below the word that means 'esteem'.
Fill in the blank with an appropriate word from the list below: Early to bed and early to rise ________ a man healthy, wealthy and wise.
Choose from the list below the most appropriate word to fill in the blank: An action which is most difficult and almost impossible to explain is ________.
Fill in the blank with an appropriate preposition from the list below: The Emperor Akbar ruled ________ a vast kingdom.
Choose the most appropriate word to fill in the blank: Ratna's mother is ________, she can't even sign her name.
Choose the appropriate word to fill in the blank: The man seems ________ because he frequently laughs loudly for no reason.
Fill in the blank with an appropriate preposition given below: Ratan entered the room and looked ________ the painting on the wall.
Find out the right word to complete the following sentence: We buy meat from a ________.
Choose the most appropriate word to fill in the blank: Amit's story about ghosts and witches is not ________.
Find out the appropriate word or words that befits the underlined part of the sentence: When buying a gift one should keep in mind the person's likes and dislikes.
